title: Special Considerations When Migrating from Uniface 9
breadcrumbs: Special Considerations When Migrating from Uniface 9
text: Special Considerations When Migrating from Uniface 9 Although Uniface provides an automatic migration path, there are always issues that will require some manual intervention during the migration process. The following topics describe how Uniface migrates definitions from Uniface 9 (and early versions of Uniface 10) and the actions you may need to take to ensure a successful migration.
